loop1.title: Power & Energy (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive power — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; trend/rate-of-change metrics are not available.

loop1.title: Voltage Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing live three-phase line-to-neutral voltages (R-N, Y-N, B-N) and their average/max/min KPIs; axis ticks and threshold values are auto-scaled or omitted as no dedicated columns exist.
